title: Realism Mats
description: The most realistic texture pack for Minecraft Java Edition
body:
_"When Minecraft graphics are better then real life!"_

I'm working on this project to make the most realistic texture pack for Minecraft that work with [SEUS PTGI shaders](https://minecraftshader.com/seus-ptgi-shaders/) and support its Raytracing features for more realistic graphics, it will also work well with the free [Nostalgia Shader](https://minecraftshader.com/nostalgia-shaders/).

Available in the following resolutions: 64x (Free) / **[1024x / 512x / 256x (Paid)](https://www.patreon.com/RealismMats)**


### Requirements:
### 
Minecraft Java Edition (**1.12**, **1.16**, **1.17**, **1.18**, **1.19**, **1.20**)

Optifine

### About Realism Mats:
### 
Realism Mats is made using Photoshop, Autodesk 3ds Max and Mudbox with so much love, attention to detail, and passion to bring this old game to life so you can enjoy it again with a fresh, new, realistic look and feel.

This passion-driven project needs your help so I can find more time to continue making it better and creating more textures.

I'm spending so much time photographing, scanning, painting and 3d sculpting most of the textures I use to make sure you get the most detailed product.

Please help this project stay alive by supporting what I do with whatever you can.

### Need help?
### 
You can find everything about Realism Mats texture pack on the website: www.realismmats.com

You can join my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/GT8528A) with +2400 members for more updates and help.


Thank you so much for your support!
